strengths: Demonstrated hands-on experience building agentic workflows and AI infrastructure at re:cinq, including MCP code generators.
Strong backend and distributed systems background with real-time, high-throughput systems at Dunnhumby and Optilyz using DLang, Node.js, and event-driven architectures.
Proven track record of technical leadership through open-source projects (GISCollective), workshops, and mentoring, showing communication and culture-building skills.
concerns: Current career gap since October 2025 raises questions about recent active engagement in production systems.
Lacks explicit evidence of leading engineering teams of 10+ people or managing hybrid external engineering models as required.
No clear demonstration of experience in regulated fintech environments, credit risk systems, or compliance infrastructure for financial AI.
response.justification: The candidate brings strong technical depth in distributed systems and agentic AI tooling, with relevant production experience in real-time and event-driven architectures, but lacks demonstrated leadership at the executive level and any clear exposure to fintech infrastructure or regulatory environments critical to the role.
